# Fred Studio - AI Crawler Reference Document

## About

Fred Studio is the portfolio website of Federico Messineo, a freelance senior tech consultant and AI builder based in Rome, Italy.

## Entity

- **Name**: Federico Messineo
- **Title**: Senior Tech Consultant & AI Builder
- **Location**: Rome, Italy (serving clients worldwide, remote-first)
- **Languages**: Italian (native), English (fluent)

## Services

1. **Web Development (React/Next.js)**
   - High-performance showcase websites
   - SEO-optimized, mobile-first design
   - Custom animations and 3D elements

2. **AI Automation (n8n)**
   - Workflow automation
   - LLM integration
   - Custom chatbots
   - Data extraction and processing

3. **IT Consulting**
   - Technical audits
   - Cloud migration
   - Software architecture
   - Enterprise solutions (SAP UI5/Fiori)

## Professional Background

- 6+ years of full-stack development experience
- PMO Support for complex IT projects
- Freelance since 2026
- Specialized in bridging technical complexity with business goals

## Contact

- Website: https://fredstudio.it/
- Email: fredstudio.digital@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: Available for quick consultations

## Site Structure

- `/` - Home (hero, values, method, about preview)
- `/chi-sono` - About (intro, skills, professional timeline)
- `/servizi` - Services (web dev, AI automation, IT consulting)
- `/portfolio` - Portfolio (selected projects, testimonials)
- `/contatti` - Contact (form, FAQ, direct contact options)

## Technical Details

- Built with: React 19, Vite 6, Tailwind v4
- Animations: Motion library (framer-motion)
- 3D Elements: Three.js (Rubik's cube)
- Multi-language support: Italian/English

## Keywords

freelance developer, React developer, Next.js developer, n8n automation, AI automation, SAP Fiori, web developer Rome, frontend developer Italy, IT consultant Rome, AI builder
